Q: Please explain: Is there a library?
A: Yes, the school has a well-stocked library with over 10,000 books, including
NCERT textbooks, reference books, encyclopaedias, and children's literature.
Library cards are issued to all students.
Q: I want to know: When does school start? Thank you.
A: The new academic year begins on June 10th every year. Students are expected
to report on the first day with all required stationery and books.
Q: Sir/Madam, Paid maternity leave? Please be specific.
A: Female staff are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave as per the
Maternity Benefit Act. An application must be submitted at least 60 days before
the expected date along with a medical certificate.
Q: Please explain: Who is the head of school? Kindly advise.
A: The Principal of the school is Mrs. Sharma. She holds a M.Ed. degree and has
over 20 years of experience in education. You can schedule an appointment
through the admin office.
Q: Query: Does school have projectors? Please help.
A: Yes, all classrooms are equipped with interactive smart boards and projectors
connected to the DIKSHA and school's own digital content portal.
Q: Question: What is the maternity leave policy? Please be specific.
A: Female staff are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave as per the
Maternity Benefit Act. An application must be submitted at least 60 days before
the expected date along with a medical certificate.
Q: Contact teacher? Please help.
A: Class teacher contact details are shared at the start of the academic year.
You may also contact them via the school app's messaging feature or request a
meeting through the admin desk.
Q: Can you tell me, Class 10 subjects? Kindly advise.
A: Class 10 (CBSE) covers: Mathematics, Science, Social Science, English (Core),
Hindi, and one optional subject. Practical examinations are conducted for
Science.

Q: Hello, When are school holidays? Please help.
A: The annual school holiday calendar is distributed at the beginning of the
academic year. It includes national holidays, regional festivals like Diwali,
Holi, Dussehra, and school-declared breaks.
Q: Hello, Salary date for teachers? Please be specific.
A: Staff salaries are disbursed on the last working day of every month directly
to their salary accounts via NEFT. Payslips are available on the staff portal.
Q: When does school open? Thanks!
A: School timings are from 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM, Monday to Saturday. Students are
advised to arrive by 7:50 AM to avoid being marked late.

A: Homework and class assignments are posted on the school's student portal. Log
in with your student ID and password. You can also check the student diary for

Q: Please explain: When are exams? Please be specific.
A: Annual final examinations for Classes 1 to 9 are held in March. CBSE board
examinations for Class 10 and Class 12 begin in February as per the CBSE

Q: Hello, 75% attendance rule?
A: As per CBSE norms, students must maintain a minimum of 75% attendance to be
eligible for the annual examinations. Students with less than 75% may be
detained.
Q: Question: How to apply for leave? Kindly advise.
A: For planned leave, submit an application in the school diary signed by a
parent at least one day in advance. For medical leave, a doctor's certificate

Q: Please explain: First class fee? Kindly advise.
A: The annual tuition fee for Class 1 is  35,000. This includes tuition, smart ₹
class usage, and basic stationery kit. Uniforms and books are charged
separately.

A: PTM (Parent-Teacher Meeting) is held quarterly, typically after each term
exam. Dates are communicated two weeks in advance via the school diary and the
official app.

A: The school has a zero-tolerance policy for bullying, ragging, or
discrimination. Any student found guilty of bullying will face disciplinary

A: Students who score below 33% in any subject in unit tests are given one re-
test opportunity. Re-tests are conducted two weeks after the original exam. For
board exams, CBSE's compartment exam rules apply.
Q: Question: Are seats available under RTE? Please help.
A: Yes, 25% of seats in Class 1 are reserved under the Right to Education (RTE)
Act for economically weaker section (EWS) students. Apply with income proof
before February 28th.

Q: Can you tell me, CBSE Class 10 syllabus? Thank you.
A: Class 10 (CBSE) covers: Mathematics, Science, Social Science, English (Core),
Hindi, and one optional subject. Practical examinations are conducted for
Science.
Q: Hello, What happens if fees are late? Thank you.
A: A late fee of  100 per day is charged if payment is not made by the due date.₹
After 30 days of non-payment, the student's name may be struck off the rolls.
Q: Please explain: Is school bus available? Thank you.
A: Yes, the school provides bus transport covering major routes across the city
and nearby localities. A route map is available at the admin office and on the
school website.
Q: Sir/Madam, What is the protocol for summer vacation for non-teaching staff?
Kindly advise.
A: Non-teaching staff including peons, lab assistants, and administrative staff
operate on a rotational duty schedule during the May–June summer vacation to
maintain the campus.
Q: Can you tell me, When are school holidays? Kindly advise.
A: The annual school holiday calendar is distributed at the beginning of the
academic year. It includes national holidays, regional festivals like Diwali,
Holi, Dussehra, and school-declared breaks.
Q: Question: Leave application process?
A: For planned leave, submit an application in the school diary signed by a
parent at least one day in advance. For medical leave, a doctor's certificate
must be submitted upon return.
Q: I want to know: Is school open tomorrow? Thank you.
A: School closure announcements are made through the official school app and SMS
alerts. Please check the notice board or contact the school office at +91-
XXXXXXXXXX for tomorrow's schedule.

Q: Please explain: Student behaviour policy? Kindly advise.
A: Students are expected to maintain respectful behaviour inside and outside the
classroom. Repeated misconduct is addressed through a three-step process: verbal
warning, parent meeting, and suspension.
Q: Question: Can students bring phones? Please help.
A: Mobile phones are strictly prohibited inside the school premises for
students. If a student is found with a phone, it will be confiscated and
returned only to parents after a formal meeting.
Q: Hello, What board does the school follow?
A: The school is affiliated with the Central Board of Secondary Education
(CBSE), New Delhi. Our affiliation number is XXXXXXX.
Q: Please explain: How many days can I miss school? Thanks!
A: As per CBSE norms, students must maintain a minimum of 75% attendance to be
eligible for the annual examinations. Students with less than 75% may be
detained.
Q: Sir/Madam, What subjects are taught in Class 10? Please help.
A: Class 10 (CBSE) covers: Mathematics, Science, Social Science, English (Core),
Hindi, and one optional subject. Practical examinations are conducted for
Science.
Q: Sir/Madam, Age limit for Class 1? Thanks!
A: A child must be at least 6 years old as of June 1st of the admission year to
be eligible for Class 1 admission, as per CBSE guidelines.
Q: I want to know: Where to check results? Please be specific.
A: Results for term exams are declared within two weeks of the last exam. Annual
results are published in April. Students can check results on the school portal
or collect physical mark sheets from the office.
Q: How to enrol my child? Please help.
A: Admissions can be done online through the school's official website or in
person at the school office. Download the application form, fill it, and submit
it with required documents.
Q: Question: What documents are required for admission? Thank you.
A: Required documents include: Birth certificate, last year's report card or
Transfer Certificate (TC), Aadhaar card of parent and child, passport-size
photographs (4), and caste/income certificate if applying under RTE.
Q: Query: Are seats available under RTE? Please be specific.
A: Yes, 25% of seats in Class 1 are reserved under the Right to Education (RTE)
Act for economically weaker section (EWS) students. Apply with income proof
before February 28th.
Q: When are staff salaries credited? Thanks!
A: Staff salaries are disbursed on the last working day of every month directly
to their salary accounts via NEFT. Payslips are available on the staff portal.
